$comment: Discriminator map: result JSON toolVersion -> schema file. Additive-only — new entries get added when a compatible flair-bench release ships (same shape, new toolVersion) or when a shape change ships as a new schema/result.vN.json; existing entries are never repointed to a different schema file. .github/workflows/validate.yml looks up a submitted result's toolVersion here to pick which schema to ajv-validate against; an unmapped toolVersion fails validation with a clear message (add the mapping, and a new schema file if the shape actually changed, in a separate PR).
